deck.title: Charles Michel de Langlade
deck.unshaded_event: Assists the British: Place three War Parties or three Tories in New York, Quebec or Northwest.
deck.shaded_event: Patriots and French rally to fight: Place three French Regulars in Quebec or three Militia in Northwest.

deck.title: Thomas Brown and the King’s Rangers
deck.unshaded_event: Tom Brown supports Tories in the South: Place one British Fort and two Tories in South Carolina or Georgia.
deck.shaded_event: Sons of Liberty rally against: Patriots place two Militia in South Carolina or Georgia and may Partisans there.

deck.title: Thaddeus Kosciuszko, Expert Engineer
deck.unshaded_event: Patriots ignore: Patriots remove any two Patriot Forts.
deck.shaded_event: Patriots embrace: In each of two Patriot Controlled spaces, Patriots may remove one Patriot piece and add one Patriot Fort.

deck.title: French Fleet Arrives in the Wrong Spot
deck.unshaded_event: Coordination with the French is a challenge: Remove up to four French Regulars from the map to Available. Free Battle anywhere with +2 Force Level.

deck.title: William Alexander, Lord Stirling
deck.unshaded_event: Captured at Long Island: Patriots Ineligible through the next card.
deck.shaded_event: …bravest man in America: Patriots may free March to and free Battle in one space.

deck.title: Lord Sandwich, First Lord of the Admiralty
deck.unshaded_event: Captain James Cook sponsored by Sandwich provides know-how: British Resources +6. Lower FNI one level.
deck.shaded_event: British lack ships to execute in America: Raise FNI one level. British Ineligible through next card.

deck.title: Jane McCrea Murdered by Indians
deck.unshaded_event: Indian Country fears: Remove one Patriot Fort from one Indian Reserve Province.
deck.shaded_event: Backlash against Indians: Remove one Indian Village.

deck.title: Benjamin Franklin Travels to France
deck.unshaded_event: Franklin is ineffective in France: Shift any two Cities each one level toward Active Support.
deck.shaded_event: Franklin takes France by storm: French Resources +3. Patriot Resources +2.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – India Conflict Goes the Other Way
deck.effect: India conflict goes the other way: Reduce the larger of CRC or CBC by half the difference (rounding down) during Reset Phase.

deck.title: Tuscarora and Oneida Come to Washington
deck.unshaded_event: Rally with the Patriots: Place one Village and two War Parties in one Colony.
deck.shaded_event: Other tribes rally against: Remove one Village and two War Parties in one Colony.

deck.title: French Ports Accept Patriot’s Ships
deck.unshaded_event: Backlash against French: British Resources +3. Lower FNI two levels.
deck.shaded_event: Extended range of privateers impacts shipping: British Resources –2. Patriot Resources +2. Raise FNI one level.

deck.title: French Fleet Sails for the Caribbean
deck.unshaded_event: French focus away from the Colonies: Move two French Regulars from Available to the West Indies. French Ineligible through the next card. Lower FNI one level.
deck.shaded_event: French battle in Grenada: Move two British Regulars from map to West Indies. British Ineligible through the next card.

deck.title: Edmund Burke on Conciliation
deck.unshaded_event: “Americans were descended largely from Englishmen”: Place one Tory from Unavailable or Available in each of three spaces.
deck.shaded_event: “…they bear the burthens of unlimited monopoly”: Shift two Cities one level each toward Passive Opposition.

deck.title: Herkimer’s Relief Column
deck.unshaded_event: Tories and Indians ambush: Indians free Gather and Tories free Muster in New York. Remove all Militia from New York.
deck.shaded_event: Patriot backlash: Remove four War Parties in or adjacent to Pennsylvania.

deck.title: God Save the King
deck.unshaded_event: “Scatter his enemies”: British free March to one space and may free Battle there.
deck.shaded_event: “But be God’s mercies known”: A non-British Faction moves units from three spaces containing British Regulars into any adjacent spaces.

deck.title: British Prison Ships
deck.unshaded_event: British efficiently deal with prisoners: Shift two Cities one level each toward Passive Support.
deck.shaded_event: British reputation damaged: In two Cities place one Militia and shift each one level toward Passive Opposition. Place one Propaganda in each.

deck.title: Jacques Necker, Finance Minister
deck.unshaded_event: War is expensive for French: French Resources –4.
deck.shaded_event: War is pricey but resources allocated to America: French Resources +3.

deck.title: French Settlers Help
deck.unshaded_event: French settlers impact the war: Place one friendly Fort or Village and three friendly Militia, War Parties or cubes in any one Indian Reserve Province.

deck.title: Antoine de Sartine, Secretary of the Navy
deck.unshaded_event: Fuels establishment push back: Move one Squadron/Blockade from West Indies to Unavailable.
deck.shaded_event: Rationalizes the French Navy: Move two Squadrons/Blockades from Unavailable to West Indies.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – Severe Winter
deck.effect: Severe Winter: If Patriots or Indians are ahead in their second victory condition (§7.2), that Faction removes one of its Forts or Villages during Reset Phase.

deck.title: The Gamecock Thomas Sumter
deck.unshaded_event: British pressure the Gamecock: Shift South Carolina or Georgia two levels toward Active Support.
deck.shaded_event: “My greatest plague”: Patriots free March to and free Battle in South Carolina or Georgia.

deck.title: Iroquois Confederacy
deck.unshaded_event: Iroquois Confederacy reconstitutes: Indians free Gather and War Path in two Indian Reserve Provinces.
deck.shaded_event: Iroquois Confederacy shatters: Remove one Indian Village.

deck.title: Adam Smith ~ Wealth of Nations
deck.unshaded_event: British intellectuals advance economy: British Resources +6.
deck.shaded_event: Adam Smith’s economic case against Imperialism: British Resources –4.

deck.title: Benedict Arnold
deck.unshaded_event: Treachery undermines the Patriot cause: Remove one Patriot Fort to Casualties and two Patriot Militia to Available from one Colony.
deck.shaded_event: Shows great leadership and resourcefulness: Remove one British Fort and two British cubes from one space to Casualties.

deck.title: Don Bernardo Takes Pensacola
deck.unshaded_event: British reinforce the lower Mississippi River Valley: Place six British cubes in either Florida or Southwest.
deck.shaded_event: Led Spanish forces against the British: French or Patriots free March to and free Battle in Florida with a +2 Force Level.

deck.title: Congress’ Speech to the Six Nations
deck.unshaded_event: Take up hatchets for King’s Troops: Indians free Gather in three Indian Reserve Provinces then free War Path in one of those spaces.
deck.shaded_event: Colonial backlash: Remove three Indian pieces from Northwest (Villages last).

deck.title: The Armada of 1779
deck.unshaded_event: French finances impact Patriots: Patriot Resources –2. French Resources –3. Lower FNI one level.
deck.shaded_event: British forces distracted from the Colonies: Remove four British Regulars from the map to Available. Raise FNI one level.

deck.title: Declaration of Independence
deck.unshaded_event: Patriots stay fractured: Remove two Continentals, two Militia and one Patriot Fort.
deck.shaded_event: Patriots come together: Place up to three Militia anywhere, one Propaganda with each. Place one Fort anywhere.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – Hurricane Hits the South
deck.effect: Hurricane hits the South: If Patriots or Indians are ahead in their second victory condition (§7.2), that Faction loses two Resources during Reset Phase.

deck.title: Tories Tested
deck.unshaded_event: Tories thrive: Place three Tories in one Colony with British Control.
deck.shaded_event: Tories flee: Replace Tories in one Colony with Militia. Place two Propaganda there.

deck.title: Frustrated Shawnee Warriors Attack
deck.unshaded_event: Raiding parties in the South: Indians place a War Party and Raid marker in VA, GA, NC and SC.
deck.shaded_event: Colonies backlash: Remove three Indian pieces total from VA, GA, NC and/or SC (Villages last).

deck.title: Cherokees Supplied by the British
deck.unshaded_event: Grow in strength: Place a second Fort or Village in a space where you have one.

deck.title: “His Majesty, King Mob” Protests
deck.unshaded_event: Anti-Catholic protests in England damage reputation: Shift three Cities one level toward Neutral.

deck.title: General Burgoyne Cracks Down
deck.unshaded_event: Indians respond positively: Indians place one Village in one space with British and Indian pieces. All War Parties on the map to Underground.
deck.shaded_event: Indian backlash: Remove one British piece in three Provinces shared with Indians (Forts last). Place one Raid marker in each space.

deck.title: Josiah Martin, NC Royal Governor, Plots
deck.unshaded_event: North Carolina Tories rise up: Place one British Fort or two Tories in North Carolina.
deck.shaded_event: North Carolina Tories targeted: Patriots may free March to then free Battle in North Carolina.

deck.title: Johnson’s Royal Greens
deck.unshaded_event: Ready for action: British may place four British cubes in either Quebec or New York from Unavailable or Available. British Eligible.
deck.shaded_event: Guerrillas rally to answer the Greens: Place three Militia or three War Parties in New York.

deck.title: Comte d’Orvilliers Builds a Fleet at Brest
deck.unshaded_event: British are prepared: Lower FNI two levels. French Resources –4.
deck.shaded_event: Challenges British naval dominance: Raise FNI one level. British Resources –3.

deck.title: HMS Russian Merchant with 4,000 Muskets
deck.unshaded_event: HMS Russian Merchant arrives in Charles Town: In up to three spaces with a British Regular, the British may add up to two Tories per space from Available or Unavailable.
deck.shaded_event: Transport sinks before arrival: British remove one in three Tories, rounding down.

deck.title: Continental Marines
deck.unshaded_event: Deployed to Louisiana to block British: Patriots remove four Continentals from map to Available.
deck.shaded_event: Deployed to defend New Jersey: Patriots place four Continentals in New Jersey.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – War on the Frontier
deck.effect: War on the frontier: If Patriots or Indians are ahead in their second victory condition (§7.2), that Faction removes one of its Forts or Villages during Reset Phase.

deck.title: De Grasse Arrives with the French Fleet
deck.unshaded_event: Balances effort in West Indies: Lower FNI one level. Remove three French Regulars from West Indies to Available.
deck.shaded_event: French coordination in North America: French or Patriots free Rally or Muster in one space and remain or become Eligible.

deck.title: Battle of the Chesapeake
deck.unshaded_event: British assert their naval dominance: FNI to 0. British Resources +2.
deck.shaded_event: British fleet distracted from Cities: FNI to 3.

deck.title: Indians Help British Raids on Mississippi
deck.unshaded_event: Increases force level: British place a total of three British Regulars and/or Tories in Southwest.
deck.shaded_event: Patriots rally against British and Indians: Place two Militia or Continentals and two French Regulars in Southwest.

deck.title: Wyoming Massacre
deck.unshaded_event: Indians intimidate on the frontier: Shift up to three Colonies adjacent to an Indian Reserve Province one level toward Neutral. Place one Raid marker in each.

deck.title: The Newburgh Conspiracy
deck.unshaded_event: Patriot officers threaten to revolt: Remove four Patriot Militia and/or Continentals in any one Colony.
deck.shaded_event: Tories revolt over lack of support: Immediately execute Tory Desertion as per Winter Quarters Round.

deck.title: Culpeper Spy Ring
deck.unshaded_event: Hercules Mulligan arrested: Activate three Patriot Militia anywhere.
deck.shaded_event: Spies reduce British effectiveness: Remove three British cubes to Casualties.

deck.title: Bermuda Gunpowder Plot
deck.unshaded_event: Gunpowder shortage: British free March to then free Battle in one space. –2 to Attacker’s Loss Level.
deck.shaded_event: Gunpowder aplenty: Patriots free March to then free Battle in one space. +2 to Defender’s Loss Level.

deck.title: Chickasaw Ally with the British
deck.unshaded_event: Benefit from the alliance: Indians or British add one Resource for every two Indian Villages on map.
deck.shaded_event: Battles in the back country: In each of two spaces, remove one War Party and two Militia or one Militia and two War Parties.

deck.title: Martha Washington to Valley Forge
deck.unshaded_event: No Bread – No Soldiers: Execute Patriot Desertion as per Winter Quarters Round.
deck.shaded_event: Women step in to bolster support and raise money: Patriot Resources +5.

deck.title: John Paul Jones
deck.unshaded_event: Limited impact: British Resources +3. Lower FNI one level. Move up to two British Regulars from Available to West Indies or any City.
deck.shaded_event: Significant benefit: Patriot Resources +5. Raise FNI one level.

deck.title: British Attack Danbury
deck.unshaded_event: British take out supply depot: Patriot Resources –3. British place one Tory in Connecticut.
deck.shaded_event: Battle of Ridgefield: Patriots place three Militia and one Continental in Connecticut.

deck.title: Admiral Pierre André de Suffren
deck.unshaded_event: Sent to India to assist: Lower FNI two levels. British Resources +2.
deck.shaded_event: Squadron isolation strategy has great success: Raise FNI one level. French Resources +3.

deck.title: Stockbridge Indians
deck.unshaded_event: Fight the Colonists: Activate all Militia in Massachusetts or in any one space with an Indian piece.
deck.shaded_event: Join the Colonists: Add three Militia in Massachusetts or any one space with an Indian piece.

deck.title: Tronson de Coudray Arrives in America
deck.unshaded_event: Arrogance damages coordination: Remove two Continentals and two French Regulars from one space to Available.
deck.shaded_event: Drowns in the Schuylkill River: Patriot Resources +3.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – Royals Commit
deck.effect: Royals commit: If CRC > CBC, French Resources +5, else British Resources +5 during Reset Phase.

deck.title: Legend of Nathan Hale
deck.unshaded_event: Poor information gathering plagues the Patriots: Patriot Resources –4.
deck.shaded_event: The legend grows and Patriots respond: Place three Patriot Militia anywhere. Patriot Resources +3.

deck.title: Edward Hand Raids into Indian Country
deck.unshaded_event: Three key lieutenants defect: British replace three Militia with three Tories in one Province.
deck.shaded_event: “Squaw Campaign” Patriots intimidate Indians: British remove two Villages.

deck.title: “If it hadn’t been so foggy…”
deck.unshaded_event: Fog allows disengagement: Select one Faction. Move any own units sharing a space with that Faction to adjacent spaces.

deck.title: Creek and Seminole Active in South
deck.unshaded_event: Increased Indian activity: Place two War Parties, one Raid marker, and one Village in South Carolina or Georgia.
deck.shaded_event: Indians challenged: Remove two War Parties total in South Carolina and/or Georgia.

deck.title: Earl of Mansfield Recalled From Paris
deck.unshaded_event: Chaos amongst the diplomats: Any one Faction Ineligible through the next card.

deck.title: Confusion Allows Slaves to Escape
deck.unshaded_event: Change in the midst of chaos: Select one Faction. That Faction must remove two of its own pieces in each of two spaces.

deck.title: Lieutenant Colonel Francis Marion
deck.unshaded_event: “Damned old fox” breaks an ankle: British or Indians move all Patriot units in North Carolina or South Carolina into an adjacent Province.
deck.shaded_event: With Liberty or Death on his cap: If Militia occupy North Carolina or South Carolina, remove four British units from that space.

deck.title: Winter Quarters – Overconfident at Home
deck.effect: Overconfident at home: If CRC > CBC, British Resources –3, else French Resources –3 during Reset Phase.

deck.title: Morgan’s Rifles
deck.unshaded_event: Virginians unhappy their Militia was sent to New England: Shift Virginia two levels toward Active Support. Place two Tories there.
deck.shaded_event: Elite light-infantry unit commanded by Daniel Morgan is deployed: Patriots perform free March to any one Colony, then free Battle, then Partisans there.

deck.title: Naval Battle in West Indies
deck.unshaded_event: British Victory at Battle of the Saintes: French remove three French Regulars on map or West Indies to Available. Lower FNI one level.
deck.shaded_event: French hold their own in the Battle de la Dominique: British remove four British Regulars from West Indies to Available.

deck.title: Rule Britannia!
deck.unshaded_event: “Rule, Britannia! rule the waves”: Place up to two British Regulars and two Tories from Unavailable or Available to any Colony.
deck.shaded_event: “Thy cities shall with commerce shine”: Any Faction may add one Resource for half the Cities under British Control, rounding down.
